name: Master Key
short_description: Master Key is a top-down adventure game with a strong focus on item-based exploration and secrets. Embark on a journey to discover what that key could be used for and meet colorful characters!
detailed_description:
An old rusty key found deep in a cave, what could it open?
Explore a dense world, fight ferocious enemies, and solve puzzles in search for answers.

Master key features :

  • Item based exploration
  • Dozens of enemies
  • Shops, weapons, and powerups
  • Dungeons
  • Between 5 and 20 hours of content
  • Lots of secrets
  • No language support!

The game doesn't hold you by the hand, it's a love letter to hiking and exploration. You have to find your own path and nothing is story-gated.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Czech, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
